svg.title: flowchart diagram
svg.desc: A flowchart diagram with 120 nodes and 130 edges. flowing top to bottom. Key nodes: Node 0, Node 1, Node 2.. Key relationships: Node 0 points to Node 1; Node 1 points to Node 2; Node 2 points to Node 3.. Layout spans 246 by 22364 units with 120 rendered node boxes and 130 routed edge paths.

text.font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
